channel.title: offline market on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in offline market on Tech Tracker

item.title: How Oppo and Vivo china mobiles dominates India's offline market.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-VrBSLCq-AxU/YuNgatao_-I/AAAAAAAAMwI/V2bW2axmWvcjvXr1H6Z6elG-iN1UQ2QYgCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1659068516105961-0.png" alt=""> Oppo and Vivo are most popular china smartphone brands from BBK electronics who expanded thier business to numerous countries over the years especially since year 2014 they focused and entered into many developing countries including India but Oppo and Vivo targeted offline market of india over online market and spend alot of money to survive in india offline market competing with existing global and indian mobile companies.
